'''âh-w-l''' ('''hawala''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:halalify|halalify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-w-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:halalify|halalify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âh-w-l
|-
! Lemma
| hawala
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hawalithi|hawalithi]] || [[word:hawaliji|hawaliji]] || [[word:hawalishi|hawalishi]] || [[word:hawali|hawali]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hawaluthuth|hawaluthuth]] || [[word:hawalujuj|hawalujuj]] || [[word:hawalushush|hawalushush]] || [[word:hawal|hawal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hawaluthu|hawaluthu]] || [[word:hawaluju|hawaluju]] || [[word:hawalushu|hawalushu]] || [[word:hawalu|hawalu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hawalufuth|hawalufuth]] || [[word:hawalufuj|hawalufuj]] || [[word:hawalufush|hawalufush]] || [[word:hawaluf|hawaluf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hawalethe|hawalethe]] || [[word:hawaleje|hawaleje]] || [[word:hawaleshe|hawaleshe]] || [[word:hawale|hawale]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hawalothoth|hawalothoth]] || [[word:hawalojoj|hawalojoj]] || [[word:hawaloshosh|hawaloshosh]] || [[word:hawal|hawal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hawalotho|hawalotho]] || [[word:hawalojo|hawalojo]] || [[word:hawalosho|hawalosho]] || [[word:hawalo|hawalo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hawalofoth|hawalofoth]] || [[word:hawalofoj|hawalofoj]] || [[word:hawalofosh|hawalofosh]] || [[word:hawalof|hawalof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hawalĂŠthĂŠ|hawalĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:hawalĂŠjĂŠ|hawalĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:hawalĂŠshĂŠ|hawalĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:hawalĂŠ|hawalĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hawalathath|hawalathath]] || [[word:hawalajaj|hawalajaj]] || [[word:hawalashash|hawalashash]] || [[word:hawal|hawal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hawalatha|hawalatha]] || [[word:hawalaja|hawalaja]] || [[word:hawalasha|hawalasha]] || [[word:hawala|hawala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hawalafath|hawalafath]] || [[word:hawalafaj|hawalafaj]] || [[word:hawalafash|hawalafash]] || [[word:hawalaf|hawalaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:hawalasha|hawalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gohawalasha|gohawalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokihawalasha|gokihawalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:hawalnĂŒsha|hawalnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gohawalnknĂŒsha|gohawalnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokihawalnĂŒsha|gokihawalnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hawalshĂ«sha|hawalshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohawalnkshĂ«sha|gohawalnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihawalshĂ«sha|gokihawalshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hawalrosha|hawalrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohawalnkrosha|gohawalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokihawalrosha|gokihawalrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hawalmusha|hawalmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gohawalnkmusha|gohawalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihawalmusha|gokihawalmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:hawalsherasha|hawalsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gohawalnksherasha|gohawalnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokihawalsherasha|gokihawalsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:hawalngasha|hawalngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gohawalnkngasha|gohawalnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokihawalngasha|gokihawalngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hawalyasha|hawalyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gohawalnkyasha|gohawalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokihawalyasha|gokihawalyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:hawalyamasha|hawalyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gohawalnkyamasha|gohawalnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokihawalyamasha|gokihawalyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:hawalnĂŒshĂ«sha|hawalnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gohawalnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gohawalnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokihawalnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokihawalnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:hawalnĂŒrosha|hawalnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohawalnknĂŒrosha|gohawalnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokihawalnĂŒrosha|gokihawalnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hawalnĂŒmusha|hawalnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohawalnknĂŒmusha|gohawalnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihawalnĂŒmusha|gokihawalnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:hawalshĂ«nĂŒsha|hawalshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gohawalnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gohawalnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokihawalshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokihawalshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:hawalshĂ«rosha|hawalshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohawalnkshĂ«rosha|gohawalnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokihawalshĂ«rosha|gokihawalshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hawalshĂ«musha|hawalshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohawalnkshĂ«musha|gohawalnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihawalshĂ«musha|gokihawalshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:hawalronĂŒsha|hawalronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gohawalnkronĂŒsha|gohawalnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokihawalronĂŒsha|gokihawalronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:hawalroshĂ«sha|hawalroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gohawalnkroshĂ«sha|gohawalnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokihawalroshĂ«sha|gokihawalroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hawalromusha|hawalromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohawalnkromusha|gohawalnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihawalromusha|gokihawalromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:hawalmunĂŒsha|hawalmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gohawalnkmunĂŒsha|gohawalnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokihawalmunĂŒsha|gokihawalmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:hawalmushĂ«sha|hawalmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gohawalnkmushĂ«sha|gohawalnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokihawalmushĂ«sha|gokihawalmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:hawalmurosha|hawalmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohawalnkmurosha|gohawalnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokihawalmurosha|gokihawalmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:hawal|hawal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hĂŠwĂŠl|hĂŠwĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hohawal|hohawal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hohĂŠwĂŠl|hohĂŠwĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohohawal|hohohawal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohohĂŠwĂŠl|hohohĂŠwĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒhawal|nĂŒhawal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒhĂŠwĂŠl|nĂŒhĂŠwĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒhawal|nĂŒnĂŒhawal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒhĂŠwĂŠl|nĂŒnĂŒhĂŠwĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻhawal|nĂŻhawal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻhĂŠwĂŠl|nĂŻhĂŠwĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻhawal|nĂŻnĂŻhawal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻhĂŠwĂŠl|nĂŻnĂŻhĂŠwĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luhawal|luhawal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luhĂŠwĂŠl|luhĂŠwĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluhawal|luluhawal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluhĂŠwĂŠl|luluhĂŠwĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lihawal|lihawal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lihĂŠwĂŠl|lihĂŠwĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilihawal|lilihawal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilihĂŠwĂŠl|lilihĂŠwĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kohawal|kohawal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kohĂŠwĂŠl|kohĂŠwĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokohawal|kokohawal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokohĂŠwĂŠl|kokohĂŠwĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kehawal|kehawal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kehĂŠwĂŠl|kehĂŠwĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekehawal|kekehawal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekehĂŠwĂŠl|kekehĂŠwĂŠl]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|91d6f4e}}
